name: Rojas Trailers
description: Landing page for a trailer company that offers different services involving trailers. The website allows users to see the services that the company offers, the trailers that they have available, and the contact information. The website also allows users to contact the company through a form.

name: Movie iOS Application
description: Application that lets the user visualize all recent movies and series. It also allows the user to see the details of the movie or series, the cast, the trailer, and the reviews. The user is also able to add those movies or series to their favorites for future use.

name: SocialConnect
description: Application that connects users with organizations that offer help to children with special needs, providing support, guidance to parents, etc. The application allows users to search for organizations that can help them with their needs and allows organizations to get known by the community.

name: Multiagent Warehouse
description: Unity simulation that uses a multi-agent system to manage a warehouse's boxes that are coming in from a conveyor belt utilizing self controlled robots.

name: Dream Lab System
description: Website that allows users to create and manage their own reservations inside a laboratory of a university using the full power of AI. Users are able to reserve a room with a specific equipment for a specific time. The system also allows the admin to manage the users and the reservations.

name: Activo
description: E-commerce ERP that centralizes product, inventory, and order management across multiple marketplaces, Shopify, Mercado Libre, Amazon, and TikTok, into a single platform. It handles the full sales cycle from stock control to invoicing.

name: Nerion
description: macOS utility application that helps users reclaim disk space by scanning for junk files, caches, logs, temp files, and dev dependencies, and safely deleting them. It follows a freemium model with a free tier (15GB/month cleanup limit) and a paid premium tier for unlimited cleanup.

name: Duskry
description: Automatic time-tracking desktop app for macOS and Windows that runs in the background tracking active windows and idle time. Organizes activity into a project-based timeline with auto-rules, reports, and a Pro billing flow, built as a monorepo with a Tauri desktop app and a separate Next.js landing page.

name: Starflight
description: Single-page 3D universe explorer that renders real star data using Three.js and custom GLSL shaders for star sprites, procedurally generated nebulae, galaxies, and a cosmic web stretching to ~4 billion light years. Users can search any catalogued star by name, warp to it with an eased animation, and freely navigate with orbit controls and WASD flight.

name: Medlink
description: Practice management platform that helps doctors automate appointment scheduling, patient reminders, and medical record storage. Patients can book appointments online 24/7, receive automatic reminders to reduce no-shows, and securely access their medical history through a simple patient portal.
